[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@fgv/ts-chocolate](./ts-chocolate.md) &gt; [Runtime](./ts-chocolate.runtime.md) &gt; [RuntimeMold](./ts-chocolate.runtime.runtimemold.md)

## Runtime.RuntimeMold class

A resolved view of a mold with computed properties.

RuntimeMold wraps a data-layer Mold and provides: - Composite identity (MoldId) for cross-source references - Computed properties (totalCapacity, displayName) - Future navigation capabilities

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeMold implements IRuntimeMold 
```
**Implements:** [IRuntimeMold](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimemold.md)
